title: Fear From The Shapes
description: "Fear From The Shapes" is a psychological horror mode and includes events, not completed yet.
body:
# **_Fear From The Shapes_**
is a **psychological horror mode**. This mod is currently under development and is not yet complete, new updates will come frequently until the mod is completed.This mod is inspired by The Broken Script, but this mod has different events and entities.

MOD FEATURES

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**This mode includes**:
- 39 **Random Event**
- 3 **Entity**
- 1 **Biome** 
- 1 **Dimension**
- 2 **İtem**

(İn newest version)

</details>



# **_Remember_**
- This mod is a singleplayer mode(not tested in multiplayer). And not completed yet.
- Events happens in 10-20 minutes, sometimes randomly

**_!Warning ı started making more mods so this mod's updates may come very slowly!_**
